overall.description: Nighttime driving sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 on a foggy elevated highway. The camera follows traffic through a dystopian cityscape with distinctive red light pillars piercing the hazy sky, passing billboards and concrete overpasses while other vehicles occasionally overtake.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway with advertising billboard

events.description: yellow van ahead accelerates and exits the frame, replaced by red car
large truck enters the left lane from behind, beginning to overtake

agents.ego_description: cruising steadily along the highway following the flow of traffic through the fog

notable_agents.action: yellow van driving ahead before accelerating away, then red car maintaining distance ahead
large truck entering left lane and approaching to overtake

entered.detail: concrete barrier with metal rail running along the right edge of the elevated highway
large illuminated advertising billboard with colorful graphics visible through the fog
tall street light casting yellow-white glow through the foggy atmosphere
distinctive vertical red light beams piercing the sky above the distant cityscape
futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows barely visible through the heavy fog

segments.scene_description: Driving on a foggy elevated highway at night, following a yellow van that soon exits the frame and is replaced by a red car ahead. A large illuminated billboard stands on the left side while distinctive red neon pillars pierce the hazy sky above the distant futuristic skyline. A large truck begins to overtake on the left as the segment ends.

events.description: large industrial truck overtakes on the left side
green sports car speeds past on the left lane

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady highway speed as larger vehicles pass by in the left lane

notable_agents.action: large industrial truck with container overtaking in the left lane
green sports car rapidly overtaking on the left at high speed

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the foggy highway as a large industrial truck and then a green sports car overtake on the left. The billboard from the previous segment disappears behind, and the red car ahead is no longer visible. Street lights continue to line the right side of the wet asphalt road.

events.description: approaching large concrete overpass structure on the left
driving alongside and partially under the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: navigating the highway as it curves slightly while passing the massive overpass structure

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass structure with multiple levels and support columns

segments.scene_description: The highway approaches and passes alongside a massive concrete overpass structure that dominates the left side of the frame. Driving under and alongside the overpass, the city skyline with its red neon pillars remains visible through the fog ahead. The road continues with guardrails on the right and the concrete structure on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a foggy elevated highway that transitions from an open stretch of road into the shadow of a massive concrete infrastructure. It begins by following a yellow van that soon exits the frame, replaced by a red car as the camera passes a large illuminated billboard and red neon pillars piercing the hazy skyline. As the red car disappears, the scene shifts to a sequence of overtaking vehicles, including a large industrial truck and a green sports car that streak past on the left. The perspective then moves beyond the billboard and street lights, gliding along the wet asphalt toward a towering concrete overpass. Finally, the camera passes under and alongside this dominant structure, keeping the distant red pillars of the futuristic city visible through the fog ahead.
